title: Terraformable Worlds Found
query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN TerraformState = 'Terraformable' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count, COUNT(*) AS totalScanned FROM Scan WHERE PlanetClass IS NOT NULL AND PlanetClass != '' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {count} terraformable world(s) — bodies flagged by the Universal Cartographics survey database as candidates for future atmospheric conversion and human colonisation — identified among {totalScanned} planetary bodies scanned during the report period. These worlds command the highest cartographic survey bonuses.
details.help: TerraformState = 'Terraformable' indicates a body eligible for terraforming. These command significant cartographic survey bonuses.

tagLines: The Terraforming Commission notes potential colonial candidates pending further assessment.
Future real estate. Assuming humanity survives long enough to move in.
Terraformable worlds are humanity's tomorrow — cold and untouched, waiting for us to arrive.
